chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "إِنَّ اَللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى يُحِبُّ اَلْعَبْدَ يَكُونُ سَهْلَ اَلْبَيْعِ سَهْلَ اَلشِّرَاءِ سَهْلَ اَلْقَضَاءِ سَهْلَ اَلاِقْتِضَاءِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3737 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Indeed, Allah (swt), the Blessed and Exalted, loves a servant who is easygoing in selling, easygoing in buying, easygoing in settling debts, and easygoing in demanding repayment."
